nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rota white-eye
nodes.summary: Rota white-eye（Zosterops rotensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rota white-eye。

nodes.name: Rota white-eye
nodes.summary: The Rota white-eye or Rota bridled white-eye (Zosterops rotensis) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is critically endangered and endemic to Rota in the Northern Mariana Islands, where it mainly occurs in mature, wet limestone forests. Social Behavior It forages and roosts in flocks. See also List of birds of the Northern Mariana Islands References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet
